market_pulse: Competitor weekend lineups dominated by mega-talent (Tiësto, Steve Aoki, Gorgon City); LIV Beach counters with Tiësto while LIV Nightclub pairs Kehlani + Gorgon City for strong Friday-Saturday momentum.

weekend_readiness.label: HIGH
factors: Tiësto at LIV Beach Saturday (high-draw artist)
Competing lineups across Hakkasan, OMNIA, Zouk all strong
LIV Nightclub Gorgon City resonates with house crowd
EDC residency context heightens competitive pressure
weekend_readiness.liv_recommendation: Lock in Tiësto activation across LIV Beach social Friday morning; use Gorgon City behind-the-scenes content to drive FOMO for Nightclub; consider 'VIP bottle drop' or 'first 50 bottles discount' teaser post to drive early arrivals.

content_gaps.description: Hakkasan, OMNIA, Zouk all pushing 24-48h countdown content (Stories + Reels). LIV Nightclub missing this urgency signal.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Deploy 3-4 countdown Reels for Saturday Gorgon City: '6 hours', '2 hours', 'LIVE NOW' with Gorgon City clip + crowd energy from past sets.

content_gaps.description: TAO Beach, Hakkasan, and Zouk leveraging macro influencer mentions. LIV social not surfacing influencer presences.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Tag 3-5 Vegas macro-influencers (20K-100K followers) in Friday/Saturday posts; offer comp tables for Stories/tag mentions.

content_gaps.description: OMNIA, Zouk, Hakkasan all posting DJ booth setup / soundcheck reels. LIV Nightclub + LIV Beach missing pre-party tech swagger.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Film Gorgon City soundcheck at LIV Nightclub; post 15-20s booth reel Friday afternoon with caption 'Ready to go' + Gorgon City tag.

influencer_activity.mention: Post tagged LIV Beach with outfit inspo + pool party vibe. High engagement on summer dayclub content.

liv_outreach_targets.reason: Vegas club promoter with strong EDM/nightlife audience; currently promoting competitors. Offer comp tables + Story tag for LIV Nightclub Saturday.
